title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Microsoft India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Microsoft India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Microsoft India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microsoft India:
Microsoft India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India!
